cue: noun. The name of the Latin script letter Q / q.
ecu: noun. The European Currency Unit (symbol ₠), a currency used in the European Community before the euro.
ens: noun. An entity or being; an existing thing, as opposed to a quality or attribute.
ensue: verb. To follow (a leader, inclination etc.).
nee: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Kumak.
nus: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nuer.
queen: noun. The wife, consort, or widow of a king.
scene: noun. The location of an event that attracts attention.
sec: symbol. Symbol of the trigonometric function secant.
see: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Seneca.
sen: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nanerige.
sequence: noun. A set of things next to each other in a set order; a series.
suq: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Suri.
